message:
refactor: Remove redundant encoder/decoder aliases in worker.ts

- Remove `const encoder = _encoder` / `const decoder = _decoder` local
  aliases, use the module-level `_encoder`/`_decoder` directly
- Remove `encoder: TextEncoder` parameter from replayTcpOps and
  replayTcpOpsViaDO (use module-level _encoder instead)
- Remove dead `const url = new URL(request.url)` from serializeRequest
- Replace duplicate inline base64 decode with base64Decode() calls
- Fix misleading while-with-break to simple if block in TCP recv
